---
title: "Caitlin Hamrock"
image: .media/plane.JPEG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/caitlin-hamrock-13555232/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/caitlinhamrock
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:Caitlinhamrock@gmail.com
  
---

I Love Joe
